title: Naam Vaazhndhidum Lyrics Vai Raja Vai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Vai Raja Vai Naam Vaazhndhidum Song Lyrics
Singer: HipHop Tamizha, Yuvan
Lyrics: Madhan Karky

I was his number one fan
when I was a kid
now we making songs with them
that sucks.

I never thought
I would make songs with legends
but i'm making this track and
I'm rapping with Yuvan

I'm a demon in a human form
Hiphop Tamizha
YEAh
I'm back from heaven
you can call me paramasivan
Mavanae enkitta
nee vachchikittana
naanthaan unakku eman
I'm a demon in a human form
Hiphop Tamizha
Yuvan, lets go

Naam vazhndhidum
indha vazhkai mudindhidum
irundhaalum vazhvom.
nam pugal adhu nirandharam

ho ho naam vazhndhidum
indha vazhvil bayam varum
adhai vendru paarthida
naam padaipom sarithiram

vettriyo thozhviyo
veeranaai vazhndhidu
un kaigalai uyarthi nee
andha vinnai vetti
mannil idu.

Karuvarai mudhal
kallarai varai
thaevei sillarai

Sillarai indri
indha vaazhkai
inikkaadha sakkarai.
ikkaraikku
akkara pachcha.
Machi en thiramaikku
munnaal nee pichcha pichcha

en mela kayya vachcha
nee seththa.
modhaadha en kitta
Vaa coz am a
Tamil naattu Gangster
Back in ma sondhaa ooru
coming monster

vai raja vai
naanga kai vachchaalae
geththuthaan .
vai raja vai
engala pagachikittaa
unakku death-uda (2)

Obama illa Osama
nee yaaavenaa
irundhuttu po maama.
aanaa enkitta prachchana venaama
naan mosamaana thamizhan, aama

Naan thala dhaan
nee tharuthala dhaan.
enna pagachchaa
vizhum koladaa
naan malai da
nee veurm yeladaa
enna pudikka illa valadaaa.
ahh ha haa..

Naam vazhndhidum
indha vazhkai mudindhidum
irundhaalum vazhvom.
nam pugal adhu nirandharam

ho ho naam vazhndhidum
indha vazhvil bayam varum
adhai vendru paarthida
naam padaipom sarithiram

vettriyo thozhviyo
veeranaai vazhndhidu
un kaigalai uyarthi nee
andha vinnai vetti
mannil idu.

Pinvaiththa kaalai
munvaiththu paarthaal
edhirikkum thannaale
verkkumada.

Singanthin koondil
sinam kondu siriththaal
singamum annaarndhu
paarkkumadaa

vai raja vai
naanga kai vachchaalae
geththuthaan .
vai raja vai
engala pagachikittaa
unakku death-uda (2)

I'm back from heaven
you can call me paramasivan
Mavanae enkitta
nee vachchikittana
naanthaan unakku yeman (2)

I go back in
the name of hiphop tamizha
with my big bro yuvan
big of the world
we rule it
yeah its that.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Naam Vaazhndhidum conveys themes of celebration and self-empowerment, reflecting the joy of living life to the fullest.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Vai Raja Vai, the song captures the protagonist's journey and the excitement of his adventures.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented singers Hip Hop Tamizha and Yuvan, both known for their unique styles.

When was the song released?

Naam Vaazhndhidum was released on May 1, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Naam Vaazhndhidum, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the carefree spirit of youth and celebration. The collaboration between Hip Hop Tamizha and Yuvan brings a unique blend of hip-hop and traditional elements, making it a standout track. The lyrics inspire listeners to embrace life and its adventures, evoking feelings of joy and motivation. This song is perfect for parties and celebrations, energizing everyone who listens.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Naam Vaazhndhidum from Vai Raja Vai is a vibrant anthem that showcases the electrifying collaboration between Hip Hop Tamizha and Yuvan. With its infectious beats and motivational lyrics, this track is sure to get you moving. Experience the fusion of talent and energy that makes this song a must-listen!
stanzaMeanings: I was his biggest fan as a child, but now we're making songs that aren't great.
I never imagined I would create songs with legends, but here I am making this track and rapping with Yuvan.
I'm a demon in human form, Hip Hop Tamizha. Yes, I'm back from heaven; you can call me Paramasivan. You think I'm a god, but I'm a demon in human form, Hip Hop Tamizha.
Yuvan, let's go.
We will live this life, whether it ends or not. Our entry is constant.
Ho ho, we will live this life; fear will come, but we will create history.
Whether it's victory or defeat, you will rise with your hands; this is the world where you conquer the sky.
From the beginning to the end, there are no limits.
This life without limits is like sugar today. It's green like a leaf. Dude, before my fame, you were nothing.
You held my hand and set me up. Don't mess with me because I'm a Tamil gangster, back in my hometown, a coming monster.
We are the kings; we have raised our hands. We are the kings; your death is coming.
You're not Obama or Osama; you can go away. But do you want trouble with me? I'm a bad Tamil, yes.
I am the leader, and you are the one who gives. Don't let my fame fall; I won't like it if you don't respect me. Ah ha ha..
We will live this life, whether it ends or not. Our entry is constant.
Ho ho, we will live this life; fear will come, but we will create history.
Whether it's victory or defeat, you will rise with your hands; this is the world where you conquer the sky.
If you look at the morning after the night, it will be waiting for you.
If a lion laughs with anger, even the lion will look at it.
We are the kings; we have raised our hands. We are the kings; your death is coming.
I'm back from heaven; you can call me Paramasivan. You think I'm a god, but I'm a demon.
I go back in the name of Hip Hop Tamizha with my big brother Yuvan; we rule the world, yeah, that's it.
